'''Banol Starkiller''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] alive during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. During the early years of the war, Benol was seen on [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]] in the [[Rodian Hunting Grounds|Etyyy]] [[Rodian Hunters' Camp]] among other members of his species.
